title: Spoilers Could other Evas awaken like Unit 01 did
display_title: Spoilers Could other Evas awaken like Unit 01 did
wikitext:
[]: *Spoilers* Could other Eva's awaken like Unit 01 did?             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Tue Jun 14, 2011 11:46 pm Would it be possible for the other Eva's to awaken like Unit 01 did and go into God mode or is this something that is unique to Unit 01? I'm kinda curious if you guys think it was possible for the other Eva's to display the kind of power Unit 01 did when it awakened.

[]:             Quote Post by illustriusCheese » Wed Jun 15, 2011 9:19 am Every Eva should be able to do that if the [s:g2i1rs7k]pilot's sync ratio is high enough.[/s:g2i1rs7k]. Oops! I mean if the plug depth is deep enough.[/s]

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Wed Jun 15, 2011 10:19 am illustriusCheese wrote: if the plug [s]depth[/s] is deep enough.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Jun 15, 2011 10:32 am The fact that it's called "Eva pseudo-evolution" rather than just "Unit 01 pseudo-evolution" does sort of suggest that it could work with other units. But while the first phase of this evolution only requires plug depth (assuming that Shinji himself doesn't have some special attribute unique to himself that makes pseudo-evolution possible, which has not been established), the second phase seems to require merging with the Rei/00/Zeruel hybrid entity (to attain the Fruit of Life? to become a Seed in its own right?) and these very specific circumstances suggest that, while this could work with any Eva, you'd need Rei/00 to complete it.

[]:             Quote Post by illustriusCheese » Wed Jun 15, 2011 11:26 am arael wrote: 2.- On the other hand, didn't wee saw in 1.11 that Eva 01 has blood type blue(something), I assume that in Rebuild, Eva 01 is different from the other Evas again...

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Wed Jun 15, 2011 5:13 pm illustriusCheese wrote: The only reason Nerv treats Unit 1 special is probably because Yui is inside of it
